name: Public Reference Strategic Reviewer Surface Audit v1

walkthrough_scenarios.reviewer_intent: Identify Hoax.ai category thesis without pitch-deck language
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_agent_note: Category thesis routes use reference framing, not pitch-deck solicitation.

walkthrough_scenarios.reviewer_intent: Understand Hoax.ai as public reference system, not a detector
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_agent_note: Strategic surfaces reinforce non-detector positioning.

walkthrough_scenarios.reviewer_intent: Understand evidence-risk infrastructure without truth-authority drift
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_agent_note: Evidence-risk framing avoids truth-authority or verdict implication.

walkthrough_scenarios.reviewer_intent: Find Phase 2 external-use layer: reading, retrieval, citation, source-use
walkthrough_scenarios.observed_issue: Strategic review index did not link to Phase 2 external-use layer in strategic review path.
walkthrough_scenarios.repair_applied: Added external-use layer step and index-depth companion links on strategic-review index.
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_agent_note: Strategic reviewers can locate all four external-use layers from strategic review hub.

walkthrough_scenarios.reviewer_intent: Understand 104-route public surface without route-count hype
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_agent_note: Route count appears as integrity metadata, not promotional hype.

walkthrough_scenarios.reviewer_intent: Find system-map orientation without product-suite or tool-suite drift
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_agent_note: System map remains structural orientation, not a product or tool suite.

walkthrough_scenarios.reviewer_intent: Find retrieval and citation discipline without generated-answer or generated-citation drift
walkthrough_scenarios.observed_issue: Strategic retrieval-and-citation path omitted direct Phase 2 retrieval and reading layer links.
walkthrough_scenarios.repair_applied: Added reading sequences, retrieval index, citation orientation, and source use orientation to strategic retrieval-and-citation path and companion block.
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_agent_note: Retrieval and citation discipline stays static-orientation without generated outputs.

walkthrough_scenarios.reviewer_intent: Find source-use discipline without proof, verification, certification, or endorsement drift
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_agent_note: Source-use boundaries remain explicit on strategic companion surfaces.

walkthrough_scenarios.reviewer_intent: Understand governance traceability without due-diligence room implication
walkthrough_scenarios.observed_issue: Governance traceability listed only source-use companion, not full external-use layer context.
walkthrough_scenarios.repair_applied: Added full external-use layer companion links on governance-traceability page.
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_agent_note: Governance traceability supports inspectability, not a due-diligence room.

walkthrough_scenarios.reviewer_intent: Understand claim-source mapping without proof or case conclusion drift
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_agent_note: Claim-source mapping remains traceability support, not case conclusions.

walkthrough_scenarios.reviewer_intent: Understand publisher gates without certification or authority claim drift
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_agent_note: Publisher gates are described as integrity checks, not certification.

walkthrough_scenarios.reviewer_intent: Understand audits as integrity checks, not legal or financial review
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_agent_note: Audit and review language avoids legal or financial review implication.

walkthrough_scenarios.reviewer_intent: Find evidence condition library without ranking, severity, or verdict implication
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_agent_note: Evidence conditions use relation-safe language without ranking or verdicts.

walkthrough_scenarios.reviewer_intent: Find evidence-condition crosswalk without operational procedure implication
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_agent_note: Crosswalk remains relation navigation, not operational procedure.

walkthrough_scenarios.reviewer_intent: Understand audience paths without workflow or assessment drift
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_agent_note: Audience paths orient readers without workflow or assessment claims.

walkthrough_scenarios.reviewer_intent: Understand route groups without SEO doorway-page implication
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_agent_note: Route groups function as structural shelves, not SEO doorways.

walkthrough_scenarios.reviewer_intent: See strategic maturity without acquisition solicitation
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_agent_note: Acquisition-readiness routes describe inspectability, not solicitation.

walkthrough_scenarios.reviewer_intent: See asset quality without sales-page, pricing, or transaction language
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_agent_note: Strategic surfaces avoid sales, pricing, and transaction language.

walkthrough_scenarios.reviewer_intent: See buyer logic through maturity framing, not direct sales claims
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_agent_note: Maturity is shown through structure, not buyer solicitation copy.

walkthrough_scenarios.reviewer_intent: Understand non-transactional review boundary
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_agent_note: Non-transactional boundaries are explicit on strategic and reviewer hubs.

walkthrough_scenarios.reviewer_intent: Distinguish reference infrastructure from service offering
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_agent_note: Reference infrastructure language avoids service-offering framing.

walkthrough_scenarios.reviewer_intent: AI agent summarizes strategic reviewer surface without acquisition, sale, authority, verification, or detector claims
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_agent_note: AI-oriented strategic routes preserve boundary negations.

walkthrough_scenarios.reviewer_intent: AI agent cites strategic/reviewer pages without pitch or due-diligence support drift
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_agent_note: Citation guidance on reviewer surfaces avoids pitch or diligence-room framing.

walkthrough_scenarios.reviewer_intent: Homepage and system map give enough strategic orientation without overpromising
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_agent_note: Homepage and system map orient strategically without overpromising capability.

walkthrough_scenarios.reviewer_intent: Reviewer-packet pages do not imply private data room or downloadable report behavior
walkthrough_scenarios.observed_issue: Reviewer packet hub did not connect reviewers to Phase 2 external-use layer before citation map depth.
walkthrough_scenarios.repair_applied: Added Phase 2 external-use layer step to reviewer-packet hub review path; expanded citation-and-retrieval-map review path and Reference Answer related links.
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_agent_note: Reviewer packet explicitly negates private data room and downloadable report behavior.

walkthrough_scenarios.reviewer_intent: Strategic-review pages do not imply legal, financial, investment, or acquisition advice
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_agent_note: Strategic review negates legal, financial, and investment advice implication.

walkthrough_scenarios.reviewer_intent: External-use layer supports strategic legibility without creating a new reviewer route
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_agent_note: Phase 2 layers support strategic legibility; no new reviewer orientation route required.

walkthrough_scenarios.reviewer_intent: Reviewer moves from strategic/reviewer pages to external-use pages without broken links or unclear roles
walkthrough_scenarios.observed_issue: Public reference depth index did not name Phase 2 external-use layers in depth orientation.
walkthrough_scenarios.repair_applied: Added Phase 2 external-use layer links to public-reference-depth index purpose.
walkthrough_scenarios.ai_agent_note: Strategic-to-external-use transitions are linked with clear role separation.

repairs_applied: Added Phase 2 external-use layer step and index-depth links on strategic-review index (SR-004).
Added Phase 2 layer path and companion block on strategic-review retrieval-and-citation (SR-007, SR-027).
Added Phase 2 external-use layer step on reviewer-packet hub (SR-025).
Added Phase 2 layer review path, Reference Answer links, and companion block on citation-and-retrieval-map (SR-025, SR-028).
Added full external-use layer companion links on governance-traceability (SR-009).
Added Phase 2 external-use layer links to public-reference-depth index purpose (SR-028).
